name: python3-imagesize
title: python3-imagesize
summary: Python module for getting image size or DPI
description:
Python module for getting image size or DPI
This module parses image header and returns width and height of the
image, or dots per inch. Supported formats are: BMP, PNG, JPEG, JPEG2000,
GIF, TIFF, SVG, Netpbm, WebP, AVIF, HEIC/HEIF.
